quote.msg: 我

replies.msg:
林夕曾為張國榮的歌曲《我》作詞，「我就是我，是顏色不一樣的煙火；天空海闊，要做最堅強的泡沫」，這首歌曾被花花在2013年的快男比賽時翻唱並引起極大反響，更是作為每年演唱會的最後一首歌，而《煙火里的塵埃》更是傳承於煙火的續篇，「我就是我，我只是我，只是一場煙火散落的塵埃」。

https://youtu.be/V3VDnkXDZHA

左右手，基情洋溢
lm

Two decades ago, he made a two-week concert tour of Malaysia which was universally acclaimed by many newspapers and television channels. He was acclaimed by Oriental Daily for his tone color and the depth of his performances as well as contribution to the cultural exchange through music between Malaysia and Hong Kong. His concert tour of Malaysia became front-page news. He was widely acclaimed on the front page of many newspapers as the greatest singer of his time. Each concert in Malaysia had an attendance of over five thousand five hundred people. He also performed in a music festival in Singapore but there was an unusually thin attendance at the festival.
